instruction: I am currently working on a ubuntu system but I do not want the notifications to bother me. Can you help me to switch to 'Do not disturb mode'?

evaluator.eval: exact_match(get_vm_command_line(env, config={'command': 'gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.notifications show-banners', 'shell': True}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expected': 'false\n'}}))
